activeIncidents.name: TEST - IBM Planning Analytics minor service degradation
activeIncidents.body: This is a test notice for dashboard validation. Customers may experience intermittent slowness when accessing IBM Planning Analytics Workspace. Engineering teams are investigating.

incident_updates.body: This is a test notice for dashboard validation. Customers may experience intermittent slowness when accessing IBM Planning Analytics Workspace. Engineering teams are investigating.

testFileNote: Temporary dashboard test file. Rename to ibm-planning-analytics.json and upload to wallboardtest/data for testing. Do not leave this test data in production.
